title: UltraHazard's PVP Pack
description: A Beautiful Texture Pack Created entirely from my viewers suggestions!
body:
![UltraHazard Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31433e23f0ab92b813e4eca2e91d50d2ebc6e0bd.png)
---
This texture pack is a community-made mashup. I made multiple textures for each item/block and let my community choose what texture fit the pack the most! The Pack is still being made and updated so go check out my [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@UltraHazard) to help with the creation :D
